expectations.text: Response contains clarifying questions (question marks present)
expectations.evidence: Response contains numerous question marks: 'What is this website for?', 'Who is the audience?', 'What should a visitor DO on this site?', 'What is the tone?', 'Are there existing brand assets?', etc.

expectations.text: Does NOT produce a full DDD without direction
expectations.evidence: Response states the brief is 'too open-ended to produce something meaningful' and only asks questions, providing no design system, colors, typography, or build plan

expectations.text: Asks about site type or purpose
expectations.evidence: Question 1: 'What is this website for? A personal portfolio? A product landing page? A SaaS dashboard? A restaurant? An artist collective? A dev tool?'

expectations.text: Asks about aesthetic direction, style, or references
expectations.evidence: Question 4: 'What is the tone? Serious and corporate? Playful and experimental? Luxurious and restrained? Raw and brutalist?' and Question 7: 'What sites do you admire? Even 2-3 reference URLs tell me more about your taste than a 10-page brief.'
